title: CRM Manage Duplicates Emails & Activities
excerpt: When using the CRM “Manage Duplicates” it only merges the notes created in the “Updates” section. My Monday.com new feature request would be to also allow the option to merge the CRM “Emails & Activities” together so all…

posts.author: j.whiting (Jessica Whiting)
posts.cookedHtml: When using the CRM “Manage Duplicates” it only merges the notes created in the “Updates” section. My Monday.com new feature request would be to also allow the option to merge the CRM “Emails & Activities” together so all relevant notes will be carried over.

posts.author: Neat (Neat)
posts.cookedHtml: I have the kind of similar issue. The email communication chain gets lost when managing duplicates, I believe we should have a Merge contact/duplicates options.

posts.author: AnishJ (Anish)
posts.cookedHtml:
Jessica Whiting:

Manage Duplicates”

hey neat can you explain it more please? I am making an app that can search through you email&activities, might be the good idea to add this merging feature as well. love to know more about use case and problem you are facing
